data.body: C4 (9ed2) plan-review PASS (0 blocking, 20 advisory — mostly false-negatives + already-handled test/doc consumers). Implemented: _advisory_lock.py rewritten ref-only (removed file backend, b859 loop, _resolve_retry_budget/_compute_backoff_seconds/backoff+CAS-retry helpers, _write/_delete/_commit tickets-file helpers, _git_show_tickets_file; kept _cas_once/_is_cas_mismatch for _ref_lock; check_pass_lock rewired to ref); lock_backend default flipped to ref; lock_max_retries key+coercion+env aliases removed (deprecated-and-ignored via unknown-key warn); .reconciler-* dropped from _GITATTRIBUTES + init-time strip migration; _purge_committed_reconciler_locks startup migration in __main__; docs/config.md + ADR C4 section + concurrency/architecture/sync/workflow comments updated. Retired file-backend tests (deleted retry_jitter, pruned advisory_lock/cas_race to ref-only, removed lock_max_retries assertions from config tests); added gitattributes-migration + purge regression tests. Full non-integration suite running. Claimed C4, committing stacked on C3.
